title: Android back button + last bug-fix bundle for v3.25
notes: JS-side back button logic now in place — close innermost overlay first (Edit Post → post detail → notifications → comments → chat → expert profile → user stack), then tab nav, then exit only at root
Note: full Android back button fix requires APK v3.26 (sideload ~/Desktop/ringin-v3.25.apk to upgrade) — it ships the @capacitor/app native plugin needed for the hardware back event
On v3.25 OTA users still get: same priority chain on the left-edge swipe-back gesture
All earlier fixes (coin sync everywhere, edit post, last seen, mute icons, autoload, carousel memory, quick-message) still in this bundle
